---
title: "NPOR: Plots"
author: jellevanderwerff
date: 04/04/2022
output:
    html_notebook:
        code_folding: hide
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
---

# Preliminaries

```{r load-packages, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

############# PACKAGES AND OTHER PRELIMINARIES ############

# for easy loading of packages
if (!require('pacman')) install.packages('pacman')

# load packages
p_load('stringr', 'ini', 'gdata', 'plyr', 'dplyr', 'here', 'ggplot2', 'reshape2', 'ggsci', 'gghighlight', 'ggridges', 'viridis', 'RColorBrewer')

# for relative file paths (e.g. here('Input', 'file.csv'))
here::i_am(file.path('scripts', 'plots', 'plots.Rmd'))

# Load custom helper functions
source(here('functions.R'))

# Knitr output settings
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  out.width = '100%'
)

```


```{r load-data, echo = FALSE}

ITIs <- readRDS(here('Dataframes', 'ITIs.rds'))
ITIs.bytrial <- readRDS(here('Dataframes', 'ITIs_bytrial.rds'))

```

# Tempo

```{r hist-tempo-by-pp}

ITIs.bytrial.tempdiff <- ITIs.bytrial
ITIs.bytrial.tempdiff$tempdiff <- ITIs.bytrial.tempdiff$ITI_mean - ITIs.bytrial.tempdiff$stim_tempo

ggplot(ITIs.bytrial.tempdiff, aes(x = tempdiff, fill = factor(pp_id), group = factor(pp_id))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Difference between tapping tempo and actual tempo (ms)",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Person",
       title = "Difference between average sequence IOI and average tapping ITI", subtitle = "Negative values mean rushing, positive values mean lagging.")

ggsave(here('Plots', 'tempdiff.png'), device = "png")




```

```{r group-ioi-vs-iti}

# melt
ioi.iti <- melt(ITIs, measure.vars = c("stim_ioi", "resp_iti"))

ggplot(ioi.iti, aes(x = value, fill = variable, group = variable)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5, bw = 5) +
  geom_rug(aes(colour = variable), alpha = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(length) + factor(stim_tempo_intended), scale = "free",
             labeller = as_labeller(c('4' = '4 events',
                                      '5' = '5 events',
                                      '400' = 'Fast trials (400 ms mean IOI)',
                                      '600' = 'Slow trials (600 ms mean IOI)'))) +
  labs(x = "IOI/ITI", y = "Density", fill = "Stim/Response") +
  scale_fill_jama(labels = c("Stimulus", "Response")) +
  scale_colour_jama()

ggsave(here('Plots', 'ITI_vs_IOI.png'), device = "png")


```

```{r individual-itis-and-iois}

ggplot(ITIs[ITIs$resp_iti < 1900,], aes(x = resp_iti, fill = factor(pp_id))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5, bw = 15) +
  geom_density(aes(x = stim_ioi), colour = "red", linetype = 3, size = 1.2, inherit.aes = FALSE, show.legend = FALSE, bw = 15) +
  geom_rug(aes(colour = factor(pp_id)), alpha = 0.2, show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(length) + factor(stim_tempo_intended), scales = "free",
             labeller = as_labeller(c('4' = '4 events',
                                      '5' = '5 events',
                                      '400' = 'Fast trials (400 ms mean IOI)',
                                      '600' = 'Slow trials (600 ms mean IOI)'))) +
  labs(x = "Distribution of intervals between taps",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Subject",
       title = "Inter-tap intervals",
       subtitle = "The red dotted line represents the stimulus intervals") +
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "A") +
  scale_colour_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "A")

ggsave(here('Plots', 'ITIs and IOIs.png'))

```


# Variance

```{r density sd}

sd.diff <- melt(ITIs.bytrial, measure.vars = c("stim_sd", "ITI_sd"))

ggplot(sd.diff, aes(x = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_rug(aes(colour = variable), show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(length) + factor(stim_tempo_intended), scale = "free",
             labeller = as_labeller(c('4' = '4 events',
                                      '5' = '5 events',
                                      '400' = 'Fast trials (400 ms mean IOI)',
                                      '600' = 'Slow trials (600 ms mean IOI)'))) +
  labs(x = "SD of sequence intervals", y = "Density", fill = "Stim/Response") +
  scale_fill_jama(labels = c("Stimulus", "Response")) +
  scale_colour_jama()

ggsave(here('Plots', 'sd.png'), device = "png")


```








# Entropy

## Values

```{r entropy-density}

labels <- as_labeller(c('4' = '4 events',
                        '5' = '5 events',
                        '400' = 'Fast trials (400 ms mean IOI)',
                        '600' = 'Slow trials (600 ms mean IOI)'))

ggplot(ITIs.bytrial,
       aes(x = resp_entropy, fill = factor(pp_id))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5, bw = 0.025) +
  geom_density(aes(x = stim_entropy), inherit.aes = FALSE, colour = "red", size = 1.2, linetype = 2, show.legend = FALSE, bw = 0.025) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(length) + factor(stim_tempo_intended), scales = "free_y", labeller = labels) +
  labs(x = "Shannon entropy",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Subject",
       title = "Stimulus and response entropy",
       subtitle = "Stimulus entropy values are indicated by red dotted line") +
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "A") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.2, 1.5))

ggsave(here('Plots', 'entropy_density.png'))

```

```{r entropy-histogram}

labels <- as_labeller(c('4' = '4 events',
                        '5' = '5 events',
                        '400' = 'Fast trials (400 ms mean IOI)',
                        '600' = 'Slow trials (600 ms mean IOI)'))

ggplot(ITIs.bytrial,
       aes(x = resp_entropy, fill = factor(pp_id))) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = stim_entropy), inherit.aes = FALSE, colour = "red", linetype = 3, show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(length) + factor(stim_tempo_intended), scales = "free", labeller = labels) +
  labs(x = "Shannon entropy",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Subject",
       title = "Entropy",
       subtitle = "Stimulus entropy values are indicated by red dotted line") +
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "A") +
  scale_colour_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "A")

```


## Difference


```{r iti-entropy-diff-histogram}


labels <- as_labeller(c('4' = '4 events',
                        '5' = '5 events',
                        '400' = 'Fast trials (400 ms mean IOI)',
                        '600' = 'Slow trials (600 ms mean IOI)'))

ggplot(ITIs.bytrial, aes(x = entropy_diff, fill = factor(pp_id), group = factor(pp_id))) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(length) + factor(stim_tempo_intended), scales = "free", labeller = labels) +
  labs(x = "Difference in Shannon entropy between stimulus and response",
       y = "Count",
       fill = "Subject",
       title = "Entropic difference",
       subtitle = "A value of zero indicates entropy was the same for stimulus and response.
Negative values indicate subject reducing entropy. Positive values indicate subject increasing entropy.")

ggsave(here('Plots', 'entropy_diff.png'))
#        scale_fill_manual(values = c("#557885", "#557885", "#557885", "#557885", "#557885", "#DF8F44"),
#                           labels = c("911", '916', '917', '920', '921', 'Stimulus'))

```




## Individual differences

```{r entropy-ids}

ggplot(ITIs.bytrial, aes(x = entropy_diff)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~factor(pp_id)) +
  labs(x = "Entropy difference", y = "Count", title = "Entropy difference by participant",
       subtitle = "A value of zero indicates entropy was the same for stimulus and response. Negative values indicate subject reducing entropy. Positive values indicate subject increasing entropy.")

```
